title: Hot Kettles
description: Adds kettles and drinks to Minecraft
body:
# Hot Kettles ![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7xIXdoHy/images/bab4eca469c1517a0cd62743f14ccd4b84c62e0f.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7xIXdoHy/images/bab4eca469c1517a0cd62743f14ccd4b84c62e0f.png) Add decorative and functional drinks to Minecraft, they are colorful, give you potion effects, and add a nice dimension of coziness to the game! # How to Use - Craft a kettle with the recipe below, right clicking the kettle with an empty hand will give you instructions on what to do next. - The options are to put cactus, water, milk, or lava in an empty kettle. - In a water kettle you can add apple or cocoa. - You can heat a kettle by putting fire, torch, or lava beneath it, which will give you hot drinks instead of cold drinks. - This covers the variety of kettles, then you can use an empty mug, crafted from a clay mug smelted in a furnace, to grab a cup of liquid from the kettle! - Some of these drinks can be used in recipes to make more fancy drinks! # Recipes

# Effects

# Do you want to play with this mod in Beta 1.7.3? The original mod created by me and Telvarost can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/telsdrinks-stationapi)
